title: Updating PostLiterate Librarian design doc to v0.3
first_prompt:
Your role
You are helping Irwin Chen update the PostLiterate Librarian & Knowledge Graph design doc from v0.2 to v0.3. This is an architecture and design document for postliterate.org — a blog, readin
summary: Irwin was working to update the architectural design document for postliterate.org, specifically moving the "PostLiterate Librarian & Knowledge Graph design doc" from version 0.2 to v0.3. The assistant first outlined a preservation plan, noting that sections 1–3, 5.1–5.2, 5.5, 6.2–6.4, 8, and 9 needed to remain intact. The process concluded with the assistant writing both files and updating the frontmatter specification by removing the `public_depth` field from the base fields, field definitions, and migration checklist
